item.title: AWS Activate
item.description: As an AWS Activate member, you can apply for AWS credits, accelerator programs offered by AWS, and browse the Showcase to explore the many startups that have built and launched a product on AWS as way to find inspiration, connect and collaborate with the AWS startup ecosystem. You can also explore the learning and training resources tailored to your startup. Showcase allows AWS Activate members to list and amplify their business to potential startup investors, customers, and partners.
